generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing point cloud data for autonomous vehicle"
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring vehicle state information such as speed, position, and orientation"
]

instance ObjectTrackingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor system for detecting and tracking objects in the vehicle's environment"
]

instance LidarPointCloudsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ObjectTrackingSensor
]

instance LidarPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object track data including detected entities and their movements transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point clouds to cluster and track objects"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions for transmitted sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and command generation for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles remote operator commands for ACC control and data collection"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks, with data saving and reporting capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, DataReporting
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system processing including lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and command generation from vehicle ECUs to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, CommandGeneration
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to control ACC settings and issue commands, and developers to collect data for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand, DataCollection
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths"
]

instance DataReporting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data saving and reporting capabilities for vehicle operation metrics"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detects lead vehicles using processed LiDAR and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calculates required speed adjustments based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates ACC control commands for vehicle acceleration or braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables Adaptive Cruise Control system via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables Adaptive Cruise Control system via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets the desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency braking command to the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataCollection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Collects operational data for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle with LiDAR, sensors, and control systems for ACC testing"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hardware component hosting Digital Twin services and processing"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hardware component hosting User Interface subcomponents"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization interface for real-time monitoring"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for manual control and configuration"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Motor Actuation and Steering Servo are transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP, processed by the Data Translation component for serialization and unit conversion. The ACC Controlling FE handles command execution and data translation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. The system comprises three entities: User Entity (with split User Interface subcomponents), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and Physical Twin Entity (resource-specific functionality including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), each deployed on distinct hardware. Not all ISO 23247 FEs were utilized, and Data Storage lacked a naturally aligned FE."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard (Part 2: Reference Architecture), which structures the Digital Twin system into Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within each entity may implement OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection and device control, as per the standard's implementation example."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "ISO 26262-1:2018 specifies a hazard analysis and risk assessment (HARA) process to identify potential hazards, determine Automotive Safety Integrity Levels (ASILs), and establish safety goals with corresponding requirements for safety-critical systems. It mandates systematic validation and verification procedures, including fail-safe mechanisms to mitigate risks from systematic and random hardware failures throughout the vehicle's operational lifecycle."
]
